# Auto-generated prettier chain signature. Do not edit manually.
# Regenerate: deno task fixtures:update:formatted <pattern>
#
# Each %%PASS=N%% section is exactly prettier^N(output_prettier.<ext>).
# This file exists when prettier is non-idempotent on output_prettier.* — it pins
# the full chain so the audit recognizes the case and the validator catches drift.
# See docs/fixture_overview.md (rule F4) and crates/tsv_debug/src/fixtures/audit_signature.rs.

%%PASS=2 (fixed point)%%
<script>
	// Block comment between left and keyword (stays inline)
	for (x /* a */ in obj) expr;

	for (x /* a */ of arr) expr;

	// Block comment between keyword and right (stays inline)
	for (x in /* a */ obj) expr;

	for (x of /* a */ arr) expr;

	// Line comment between left and keyword (breaks)
	for (x in obj)
		// a
		expr;

	for (x of arr)
		// a
		expr;

	// Line comment between keyword and right (breaks)
	for (x in obj)
		// a
		expr;

	for (x of arr)
		// a
		expr;

	// Block comment between ) and body in breaking layout
	for (x in obj)
		// a
		/* b */ expr;

	for (x of arr)
		// a
		/* b */ expr;

	// With declaration
	for (const a /* a */ in obj) expr;

	for (const a /* a */ of arr) expr;
</script>
